image.title: NASK Jain, R Parsanathan, SN Levine, JA Bocchini, MF Holick, JA Vanchiere

item.title: The potential link between inherited G6PD deficiency, oxidative stress, and vitamin D deficiency and the racial inequities in mortality associated with COVID-19.
